# PRC Group

> Full-service painting, carpentry and home remodeling company based in
> Wakefield, Massachusetts, serving the North Shore and Greater Boston
> since 2017. Licensed & insured. Free written estimates.

## Company Facts

- Business: PRC Group — Painting · Carpentry · Remodeling
- Address: 86 Albion St, Wakefield, MA 01880
- Phone: (781) 520-8245
- Email: info@prcgroupcompany.com
- Website: https://prcgroupcompany.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/prc_group_inc
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/prcgroupinc
- Founded: 2017
- Hours: Mon–Sat, 8AM–6PM
- Credentials: Licensed & insured; EPA lead-safe practices on pre-1978 homes;
  written workmanship warranty on every project

## Services

- [Interior Painting](https://prcgroupcompany.com/interior-painting.php): walls, ceilings, trim and cabinet refinishing
- [Exterior Painting](https://prcgroupcompany.com/exterior-painting.php): full-prep repaints, siding, decks and doors
- [General Carpentry](https://prcgroupcompany.com/general-carpentry.php): decks, framing, structural repairs, doors, windows, siding
- [Finish Carpentry](https://prcgroupcompany.com/finish-carpentry.php): crown molding, wainscoting, built-ins, custom trim
- [Home Remodeling](https://prcgroupcompany.com/home-remodeling.php): kitchens, bathrooms and full-room renovations

## Service Areas

- [All service areas](https://prcgroupcompany.com/service-areas.php)
- Cities with dedicated pages: Wakefield, Winchester, Lynnfield, Reading,
  North Reading, Melrose, Stoneham, Lexington, Andover, Marblehead,
  Swampscott, Woburn — pages follow the pattern
  https://prcgroupcompany.com/painting-{city}-ma.php

- [Instant Quote Calculator & Color Visualizer](https://prcgroupcompany.com/tools.php)
